Donners_2021.P: Patients receiving immunosuppressive therapy (e.g., transplant recipients, autoimmune disease patients)
Donners_2021.I: Therapeutic drug monitoring or pharmacokinetic analysis of immunosuppressive drugs
Donners_2021.C: Standard dosing without therapeutic drug monitoring
Donners_2021.O: Drug efficacy, toxicity, graft survival, clinical outcomes
Donners_2021.S: Clinical trials, observational studies, pharmacokinetic studies
Donners_2021.E: Animal studies, in-vitro studies, reviews, editorials, case reports with n<5

Menon_2022.P: Adults or children with clinical conditions requiring intervention
Menon_2022.I: Any clinical intervention studied in a systematic review or meta-analysis context
Menon_2022.C: Placebo, standard care, or alternative interventions
Menon_2022.O: Clinical effectiveness outcomes, adverse events, quality of life
Menon_2022.S: Systematic reviews, meta-analyses, randomized controlled trials
Menon_2022.E: Non-systematic reviews, narrative reviews, protocols without results

Sep_2021.P: Adults with mental health conditions (depression, anxiety, PTSD)
Sep_2021.I: Psychological interventions, psychotherapy, cognitive behavioral therapy
Sep_2021.C: Waitlist, treatment as usual, placebo, other active treatments
Sep_2021.O: Mental health symptom improvement, remission, quality of life, functioning
Sep_2021.S: Randomized controlled trials, controlled clinical trials
Sep_2021.E: Uncontrolled studies, case studies, qualitative-only studies, animal studies

Meijboom_2021.P: Patients with specific health conditions in primary or secondary care
Meijboom_2021.I: Health interventions, diagnostics, or treatments under review
Meijboom_2021.C: Standard care, alternative treatments, no treatment
Meijboom_2021.O: Health outcomes, diagnostic accuracy, treatment effectiveness
Meijboom_2021.S: Original research studies with empirical data
Meijboom_2021.E: Editorials, commentaries, letters, conference abstracts without full data

Nelson_2002.P: Patients with clinical conditions requiring screening or preventive intervention
Nelson_2002.I: Screening tests, preventive treatments, clinical interventions
Nelson_2002.C: No screening, standard care, alternative screening methods
Nelson_2002.O: Disease detection rates, morbidity, mortality, harms of screening
Nelson_2002.S: Randomized controlled trials, cohort studies, diagnostic accuracy studies
Nelson_2002.E: Non-English studies, animal studies, modeling studies without clinical data
